options.a: alert inadvertent excursions beyond limit speeds, VMO/MMO (Maximum Operating Limit Speed/Mach Number).
options.b: prevent inadvertent excursions beyond limit speed V<sub>D</sub> (Design Diving Speed).
options.c: alert crew of an impending engine overspeed condition.
options.d: prevent inadvertent excursions below limit speed V<sub>S</sub> (Stall Speed).
